presets.name: Suez Canal Blockade
presets.description: A major shipping vessel has blocked the Suez Canal, severing the critical East-West maritime corridor.

presets.name: Persian Gulf Conflict
presets.description: Escalating military tensions in the Persian Gulf region threatening energy supply routes.

presets.name: South Asia Sanctions
presets.description: New trade sanctions imposed on South Asian nations affecting pharmaceutical exports.

presets.name: East Asia Port Strike
presets.description: Coordinated port worker strikes across major East Asian shipping hubs.

presets.name: Strait of Hormuz Crisis
presets.description: Iran threatens to close the Strait of Hormuz, disrupting 20%+ of global oil transit.
